UserPromptSubmit.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$logPath = '.github\hooks\agent_log.txt'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Split-Path $logPath) | Out-Null; $input | Add-Content -Path $logPath"

preToolUse.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$logPath = '.github\hooks\agent_log.txt'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Split-Path $logPath) | Out-Null; $input | Add-Content -Path $logPath"
